text:
Close this PR?

All releases currently supported have CreateBootENv documented:
https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=freebsd-update.conf&apropos=0&sektion=5&manpath=FreeBSD+13.3-RELEASE&arch=default&format=html

https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=freebsd-update.conf&apropos=0&sektion=5&manpath=FreeBSD+14.0-RELEASE&arch=default&format=html
